325.reason: The end() method returns true when curPos >= source.length() - 1, but the last character is at index source.length() - 1. This means when curPos equals source.length() - 1 (the last character), end() returns true, causing the loop to exit before processing the last character. The condition should be curPos >= source.length() to correctly indicate the end of input.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  The end() method returns true when curPos >= source.length() - 1, but the last character is at index source.length() - 1. This means when curPos equals source.length() - 1 (the last character), end() returns true, causing the loop to exit prematurely without processing the last character. The correct condition should be curPos >= source.length().

158.reason: Error: should be isSQuotation() instead of isDQuotation(), causing incorrect parsing of char constants (infinite loop or wrong token).

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: should be isSQuotation() instead of isDQuotation(), causing incorrect parsing of char constants (infinite loop or wrong token).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: condition uses isDQuotation() (double quote) instead of isSQuotation() (single quote), causing the loop to never terminate on a single-quote character, leading to incorrect tokenization of char constants]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition checks for double quotes instead of single quotes, causing the lexer to fail to correctly identify character constants and likely hang or produce incorrect tokens. It should be !isSQuotation().
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition checks for double quotes instead of single quotes, causing the lexer to fail to correctly identify character constants and likely enter an infinite loop or consume incorrect tokens. It should be !isSQuotation().
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition incorrectly checks for double quotation mark (") instead of single quotation mark (') when parsing character literals, causing infinite loop or incorrect parsing for char constants like 'A' or ' ']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition checks for double quotation mark (") instead of single quotation mark (') when parsing a character constant, causing incorrect loop termination and malformed token recognition for CharConst]
